## SECTION A: Domain DTOs (dataclasses)

### SessionBrief
**File:** `domain/session.py`  
**Invariant:** Immutable after creation (frozen=True)

| Field | Python Type | Go Type | Constraints |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| session_id | str | string | UUID-format, non-empty |
| tags | list[str] | []string | max 20 items |
| brief | str | string | max 50 chars |
| importance | Importance (Enum) | ImportanceLevel (iota) | critical/important/background/principle |
| embedding | bytes | []float32 | float16 512d, len=1024 bytes |
| age_signal | AgeSignal (Enum) | AgeSignal (iota) | fresh/actual/stale/archive |
| score | float | float64 | 0.0–1.0 |
| conflict_flag | bool | bool | — |
| created_at | int | int64 | Unix timestamp |

**Result type:** `Result[SessionBrief, NotFoundError]`

---

### PipelineContext
**File:** `domain/pipeline.py`  
**Invariant:** Mutable within pipeline only

| Field | Python Type | Go Type | Constraints |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| event | IOEvent | IOEvent | non-nil |
| importance | str \| None | *string | nil = not yet classified |
| entities | list[Entity] | []Entity | can be empty |
| embedding | bytes \| None | []byte | nil until Step 3 |
| score | float \| None | *float64 | nil until Step 5 |
| should_abort | bool | bool | if True — pipeline stopped |

## SECTION D: Result Types

```python
# domain/types.py
type Ok[T] = tuple[T, None]
type Err[E: Exception] = tuple[None, E]
type Result[T, E: Exception = Exception] = Ok[T] | Err[E]
```
